---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new research workflow, template set, or venue-specific review capability
title: "[proposal] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What research task is not well supported today?

## User and Workflow

Who needs this, and where would it fit in the existing workflow?

- paper ideation
- literature mapping
- paper reproduction
- experiment design
- experiment ops
- artifact audit
- writing and layout
- submission and review
- memory and learning

## Proposed Skill or Expansion

Describe the skill, branch, or template set you want.

## Why Existing Skills Are Not Enough

Point to the current skill or workflow gap.

## Expected Outputs

What should the user get at the end?

- checklist
- template
- review rubric
- orchestration flow
- generated assets
- install or packaging improvement

## Target Domain

- AI / ML
- systems
- networking
- multi-domain
- venue-specific

## Example Input

Give one realistic input prompt, paper state, or repository state.
